creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
If you go to the gitlab url in firefox, this happens:

Checking your browser before accessing gitlab.com.

This process is automatic. Your browser will redirect to your requested content shortly.

Please allow up to 5 seconds…

...and it never completes

If I go to the gitlab url in dooble, I get the same page but after 5 seconds I'm presented with a login screen https://gitlab.com/users/sign_in
